{{Quote|Soon you will understand the true meaning of power Tyber Zann.|[[Silri]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
The '''Carbonite Sith Army''' was an army of [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] that had been frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and put into storage on a rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. At the head of the cavernous chamber where the army was placed in rows, a prominent [[Carbonite Sith Master|statue]] wielding an ignited [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and bearing the emblem of the old [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] at its base had been erected. Soon after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Silri]] rediscovered the army by following information obtained from a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]].

==History==
At an unknown point in time, a host of soldiers that appeared to be [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] were frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and placed in neat rows and columns in front of the statue of an unknown cloaked individual. It was believed that they had survived the process because their carbonite casings were still blinking when they were uncovered during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The troopers were placed inside a large tomb-like cavern, which had been sealed off. [[Carbonite Sith Army holocron|A single]] Sith [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] held the location of the army within its database; when accessed, the information revealed a diagram much like that of a [[Star Map]], which led the user to the planet where the army had been placed.

The great tomb was discovered by the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Silri]] not long after the [[Battle for the Eclipse|Battle for the ''Eclipse'']]. She had been examining the holocron, which [[Tyber Zann]] and [[Urai Fen]] of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] had attempted to steal from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]], and later reacquired after a daring raid on [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] personal vault on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Silri was then able to follow the Star Map to the [[Unidentified planet (Carbonite Tomb)|planet]] where, after apparently entering a code into a terminal located next to the large stone doorway, the entrance slid open, revealing the army standing in suspended animation.

==Behind the scenes==
Though not seen in the cutscene which reveals the frozen army (and therefore may well not be canon), an [[Carbonite Sith Master|unknown Sith]] was also frozen in carbonite. Next to his frozen figure sat an urn, whose contents are unknown. On the lid of the urn sat a lightsaber.

The emblem of the Sith Empire during the Jedi Civil War is on the front of the huge statue at the end of the room. Although the symbol itself is not seen during the in-game cutscene, it can be spotted by examining the object in the ''Forces of Corruption'' Map Editor.
